description_long: This street light features a tall, slender cylindrical pole with a matte black finish, supporting a single, elongated rectangular lamp head. The lamp head is attached to the pole via a smoothly curved arm, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The lamp head itself is flat and thin, likely housing an LED panel, and is oriented horizontally to cast light downward. The base of the pole is slightly wider, providing stability for ground installation. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments on the pole, emphasizing a utilitarian and contemporary design. The overall structure is streamlined, making it suitable for urban sidewalks, parks, or modern streetscapes.
description: A modern, black street light with a slim pole and a flat, rectangular lamp head on a curved arm, designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the slim pole and the narrow profile of the rectangular lamp head directly above the pole.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the curved arm extending from the pole and the full length of the flat, rectangular lamp head.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the lamp head and the straight alignment of the pole, similar to the front but with the lamp head's rear visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the curved arm and the lamp head extending horizontally.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, flat rectangular design with a thin profile and no visible decorative elements; likely features a built-in diffuser for even light distribution.
